narrative:
Miami Township C (precinct in Clermont County) has 839 registered voters, with 47.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.3 percentage points.
